mapper.sql: id, part, sub_type, topic_key, question_text, cue_card, follow_up_questions_json, prep_seconds, answer_seconds, display_order, active, created_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_question ORDER BY part, sub_type, display_order, id
mapper.update: UPDATE speaking_question SET part = #{part}, sub_type = #{subType}, topic_key = #{topicKey}, question_text = #{questionText}, cue_card = #{cueCard}, follow_up_questions_json = #{followUpQuestionsJson}, prep_seconds = #{prepSeconds}, answer_seconds = #{answerSeconds}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, active = #{active} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_question WHERE part = #{part} AND active = 1 ORDER BY display_order, id
